generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators for generated contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use annex agree for component type contracts
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Use visible feature names and concrete bounds for input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not use AADL property associations as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
